items.message: No action needed: Analyzed PR #58068 (commit 4773e9c) by `@ArcturusZhang` which added the new Azure.Provisioning.ResourceGraph library. The README contains all required sections, includes a working code example backed by a proper #region Snippet:ResourceGraphQueryBasic in tests/BasicResourceGraphTests.cs, and a CHANGELOG entry. The empty "Authenticate the Client" and "Next steps" sections are consistent with the established pattern across all Azure.Provisioning.* libraries in this repository (e.g., Azure.Provisioning.Storage follows the identical pattern). No documentation gaps unique to this change were found.
